news.t: VolShares to launch first-ever Solana futures ETFs in US tomorrow

overview.description: The Solana ETF (SOLZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long sol, short usd currency. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital appreciation by providing the same daily price movements of Solana (SOL). The funds primary investment is cash-settled futures contracts SOLZ was launched on Mar 20, 2025 and is issued by Volatility Shares.

data.title: VolShares to launch first-ever Solana futures ETFs in US tomorrow
data.text: Volatility Shares is set to launch the first-ever Solana (SOL) futures exchange-traded funds (ETFs) in the United States.  The Volatility Shares Solana ETF and Volatility Shares Solana 2x ETF will deb...
